title: WIP: Volume Plugins
body: For now, only the skeleton which we use to contact individual plugins. The bits that actually connect to Libpod are going to be exceedingly difficult to get right, given the volumes only "sort of" exist in Libpod and the database (primary management is delegated elsewhere, which is something that was definitely not in mind we we originally wrote Libpod).

Guys, any progress on this? The lack of NFS volumes blocks us from deploying our ABAP systems.
NFS volumes are a separate issues and have been working for a while (Podman 1.7 or 1.8, I forget which)
Oh, yeah, sorry, I had old information from colleagues of mine and I didn't bother to re-test.
